name: Agent Reach
description_en: Gives an AI agent internet access—read and search 13 platforms (Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, GitHub, LinkedIn, V2EX, RSS, web pages, podcasts) through one CLI with multi-backend routing and zero paid APIs.
description_zh: 给 AI agent 装上互联网能力——通过一个 CLI、多后端路由、零付费 API，读取与搜索 13 个平台(Twitter/X、Reddit、YouTube、B 站、小红书、GitHub、领英、V2EX、RSS、网页、播客)。
long_en: A companion Claude skill (SKILL.md) acts as an 'internet capability router': it maps a user's intent or a pasted URL to the right agent-reach CLI command, runs `agent-reach doctor` to pick a working backend per platform, and falls back across backends when one is blocked. Six channels (web, YouTube, RSS, V2EX, full-text search, public GitHub) work with zero config; login-gated platforms (Twitter, Reddit, Xiaohongshu, LinkedIn) unlock with the user's own cookies. It is read/search only—no posting—so it gives the agent eyes, not hands.
long_zh: 随仓库附带的 Claude skill(SKILL.md)是一个「互联网能力路由器」:把用户意图或粘贴的链接映射到对应的 agent-reach CLI 命令,先跑 `agent-reach doctor` 为每个平台挑选可用后端,某个接入失效时自动切换备选。六个渠道(网页、YouTube、RSS、V2EX、全文搜索、公开 GitHub)零配置可用;需登录的平台(Twitter、Reddit、小红书、领英)用用户自己的 Cookie 解锁。仅读取 / 搜索、不发帖——给 agent 眼睛而非手。
sec_note_en: Installs and drives the open-source (MIT) `agent-reach` Python CLI per the repo's install doc—not a standalone skill clone. For login-gated platforms it uses your own browser cookies / login session, stored locally and not uploaded. It is read/search only (no posting or write actions) and routes around platform blocks—review fetched content and respect each site's terms.
sec_note_zh: 按仓库的安装文档安装并驱动开源(MIT)的 `agent-reach` Python CLI,并非单纯克隆一个 skill 目录。需登录的平台会使用你自己的浏览器 Cookie / 登录态,仅存本地、不上传。仅读取 / 搜索(不发帖、不做写操作),并会绕过平台访问限制——请审阅抓取到的内容并遵守各站点条款。
